mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_collection_target WHERE type = #{type} ORDER BY code
SELECT * FROM data_collection_target WHERE active = #{active} ORDER BY code
SELECT * FROM data_collection_target WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY code
SELECT * FROM data_collection_target WHERE active = true ORDER BY type, code
SELECT * FROM data_collection_target WHERE active = true AND (next_collection_time IS NULL OR next_collection_time <= NOW()) ORDER BY type, code
SELECT * FROM data_collection_target WHERE (code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY type, code LIMIT 50
SELECT * FROM data_collection_target WHERE type = #{type} AND (code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY code LIMIT 50
